title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Mahindra Logistics - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Mahindra Logistics - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Mahindra Logistics invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Distribution Manager at our Mysuru location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Mahindra Logistics:
Mahindra Logistics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahindra Logistics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
